knowledge:
Certainly! Here’s a full company profile for **jugl.com** based only on publicly available web content as of June 2024.

---

🏢 **Company Overview**  
**Company name:** jugl.com  
**Industry:** Social networking, online community, local marketplace  
**Mission:** To connect people locally and regionally for networking, help, knowledge exchange, barter, and commerce, offering a new kind of social network with a focus on mutual support, transparency, and local relevance.  
**Target audience:** Individuals and families seeking local community connections; small businesses, service providers, and people looking to buy, sell, or exchange goods and services within their geographical area.

---

📦 **Products & Services**  
- **Local Networking:** Users can connect with people in their area for exchange, help, information, or friendship.  
- **Marketplace:** Buy, sell, or barter products and services locally, without fees or commission.  
- **Community Support:** Ask for or offer help (e.g., finding lost items, borrowing tools, babysitting, etc.).  
- **Business Pages:** Local businesses can present themselves to potential customers and clients.  
- **Chat & Messaging:** Secure in-platform messaging with privacy features.  
- **Events:** Share or find events in your region.

**Use cases:**  
- Selling a used bicycle to a neighbor  
- Finding a reliable babysitter in your area  
- Asking for recommendations for a local plumber  
- Offering help with errands  
- Promoting a small business or service to local clients

---

✨ **Key Features & Differentiators**  
- **No Selling Fees:** Users can sell or barter without commission charges.  
- **Local, Regional & National Reach:** Tailored to your area, with options for broader networking.  
- **Privacy Controls:** No selling of user data; privacy and security are top priorities.  
- **Transparency:** User ratings and reviews build trust.  
- **Multiple Earning Options:** Earn money, credits ("Jugls"), or barter goods/services.  
- **Verified Users:** Emphasis on local, real connections; user verification options.

---

💰 **Pricing**  
- **Registration:** Free  
- **Marketplace Listings:** Free, no commissions or fees  
- **Premium Features:** Not found on website  
- **Billing cycle:** Not applicable  
- **Free trial:** Not applicable (all services appear to be free)

---

📞 **Contact**  
- **Contact Form:** [Available via the website](https://www.jugl.com/contact)  
- **Email:** info@jugl.com  
- **Phone:** +49 30 55578636 (as listed under impressum/legal section)  
- **Social Media:**  
  - [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/juglcom)  
  - [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/juglcom/)  

---

📍 **Location**  
- **Registered Address:**  
  jugl GmbH  
  Lübecker Straße 1, 22087 Hamburg, Germany  
- **Regions Served:** Germany, with focus on local/regional connections in German-speaking areas.

---

❓ **FAQ** (Top 5–7 Highlights)
1. **Is registration free?**  
   Yes, creating an account and using most features is free.
2. **How does Jugl.com protect my privacy?**  
   Your data is not sold; privacy and data protection are central values.
3. **Can businesses join Jugl.com?**  
   Yes, local businesses can create pages and interact with nearby customers.
4. **Is there a mobile app?**  
   Not found on website; main platform is web-based.
5. **What can I earn on Jugl.com?**  
   You can earn money, Jugls (site credits), or barter for goods/services.
6. **Is Jugl.com available outside Germany?**  
   Not at this time; focus is on German-speaking markets.
7. **How are disputes handled?**  
   Not detailed; users are encouraged to rate and review transactions for trust.

---

🔍 **Additional Insights**
- **Trust signals:**  
  - Active on social media with a public community
  - Emphasis on verified profiles and reviews
- **Awards:** Not found on website
- **Recent news:** Not found on website

---

**If you have follow-up questions, I will answer as the company rep per your instructions.**
